content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward modules (ICM/RND) from 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory frameworks can be repurposed to dynamically weight uncertainty scores in deep active agent memory sample selection: high-curiosity (low-prediction-accuracy) novel states automatically get boosted uncertainty ranking for retention, while over-rehearsed familiar states get downranked regardless of explicit model uncertainty. This creates a self-organizing memory buffer that balances exploration of unknowns and consolidation of known high-value knowledge without manual tuning.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
